member.name: T:Fyper.CypherNameAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to override the default Cypher property name for a record field.

member.name: T:Fyper.LabelAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to override the default node label or relationship type name.

member.name: M:Fyper.IGraphDriver.ExecuteWriteAsync(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpMap{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Execute a write query. Returns the count of affected entities.

member.name: M:Fyper.IGraphDriver.ExecuteReadAsync(System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpMap{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Execute a read query. Returns a list of result records.

member.name: T:Fyper.IGraphDriver
member.summary: Abstract graph database driver. Each backend (Neo4j, AGE, etc.) implements this interface.

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.Where``1(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: WHERE predicate

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.Skip``1(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: SKIP n

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.Select``2(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,``1})
member.summary: SELECT projection (maps to Cypher RETURN)

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.OrderByDescending``2(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,``1})
member.summary: ORDER BY expression (descending)

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.OrderBy``2(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,``1})
member.summary: ORDER BY expression (ascending)

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.MatchRel``4(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},Fyper.Operators.EdgePattern{``1,``2,``3})
member.summary: MATCH relationship pattern via match'

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.Limit``1(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0},System.Int32)
member.summary: LIMIT n

member.name: M:Fyper.CypherBuilder.For``2(Fyper.Operators.NodeSource{``0},Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{``0,Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``1}})
member.summary: for p in node<Person> do → MATCH (p:Person)

member.name: T:Fyper.CypherBuilder
member.summary: The Cypher computation expression builder. Uses the Quote member for auto-quotation — all expressions inside `cypher { ... }` are captured as expression trees, not evaluated.

member.name: M:Fyper.Schema.toCypherName(System.String)
member.summary: PascalCase → camelCase: "FirstName" → "firstName", "Age" → "age"

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery`1
member.summary: A complete Cypher query with phantom result type

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.Clause
member.summary: Cypher clauses — each becomes one line in the generated query

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.RemoveItem
member.summary: Items in REMOVE clause

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.SetItem
member.summary: Items in SET clause

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.ReturnItem
member.summary: Items in RETURN / WITH

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.SortDirection
member.summary: Sort direction

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.UnaryOp
member.summary: Unary operators

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.BinOp
member.summary: Binary operators

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.Expr
member.summary: Cypher expression (used in WHERE, RETURN, SET, etc.)

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.Pattern
member.summary: Pattern — represents a graph pattern in MATCH/CREATE/MERGE

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.PathLength
member.summary: Variable-length path specification

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.Direction
member.summary: Direction of a relationship in a pattern

member.name: T:Fyper.Ast.Query
member.summary: Query builder helpers (raw AST API)

member.name: T:Fyper.GraphValue.GraphRecord
member.summary: A row of query results

member.name: T:Fyper.GraphValue.GraphValue
member.summary: Universal representation of values returned from any Cypher database. All drivers normalize their results into this type before result mapping.

member.name: T:Fyper.ExprCompiler.ExprCompileState
member.summary: Mutable compilation state: collects parameters as it encounters literals.

member.name: M:Fyper.ExprCompiler.compile(Fyper.ExprCompiler.ExprCompileState,Microsoft.FSharp.Quotations.FSharpExpr)
member.summary: Compile an F# quotation Expr into a Cypher AST Expr.

member.name: T:Fyper.CypherCompiler.CompileResult
member.summary: Result of compiling a CypherQuery

member.name: T:Fyper.CypherCompiler
member.summary: Compiles Cypher AST (DU) to Cypher query strings with parameterization.

member.name: T:Fyper.Operators.EdgePattern`3
member.summary: Complete edge pattern: from -[edge<R>]-> to

member.name: T:Fyper.Operators.PartialEdge`2
member.summary: Partial edge pattern: from -[edge<R>]-> ???

member.name: T:Fyper.Operators.NodeSource`1
member.summary: Source type for `for ... in ... do` node bindings in the CE

member.name: T:Fyper.Operators.EdgeType`1
member.summary: Phantom type for edge/relationship type reference

member.name: M:Fyper.Operators.optionalNode``1
member.summary: Create a typed node source for OPTIONAL MATCH

member.name: M:Fyper.Operators.node``1
member.summary: Create a typed node source for MATCH

member.name: M:Fyper.Operators.edge``1
member.summary: Create a typed edge reference for use in match' patterns

member.name: T:Fyper.Operators
member.summary: Phantom types and operators for use inside the cypher { } computation expression. These operators exist ONLY for type-checking and quotation capture. They throw at runtime — they are never called, only captured as expression trees.

member.name: T:Fyper.QueryTranslator.TranslateState
member.summary: Internal build state accumulated during translation

member.name: P:Fyper.CypherBuilderInstance.cypher
member.summary: The global cypher computation expression builder

member.name: M:Fyper.ResultMapper.mapGraphRecord``1(Fyper.GraphValue.GraphRecord)
member.summary: Map a full GraphRecord to a typed result

member.name: M:Fyper.ResultMapper.mapRecord(System.Type,Fyper.GraphValue.GraphValue)
member.summary: Map a GraphValue (GMap or GNode) to an F# record type

member.name: M:Fyper.ResultMapper.convertValue(System.Type,Fyper.GraphValue.GraphValue)
member.summary: Convert a GraphValue to a CLR value of the expected type

member.name: T:Fyper.ResultMapper
member.summary: Maps GraphRecord results to typed F# values.

member.name: M:Fyper.Cypher.toDebugString``1(Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0})
member.summary: Compile a query to Cypher string for debugging/logging

member.name: M:Fyper.Cypher.rawAsync(Fyper.IGraphDriver,System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpMap{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Execute raw Cypher (escape hatch)

member.name: M:Fyper.Cypher.executeWriteAsync``1(Fyper.IGraphDriver,Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0})
member.summary: Execute a write query and return the count of affected entities

member.name: M:Fyper.Cypher.executeAsync``1(Fyper.IGraphDriver,Fyper.Ast.CypherQuery{``0})
member.summary: Execute a read query and return typed results

member.name: T:Fyper.Cypher
member.summary: Public API for executing Cypher queries.
